scripts.check: node --check scripts/google_earth_crop_core.mjs && node --check scripts/crop_google_earth.mjs && node --check scripts/benchmark_google_earth_crop.mjs && python -m json.tool package.json >/dev/null && python -m json.tool evals/evals.json >/dev/null && python -m json.tool benchmarks/baseline-2026-06-10.json >/dev/null
scripts.install:playwright: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.eval:full: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && node scripts/benchmark_google_earth_crop.mjs --output benchmark-runs/us-10-coordinate
